title: MobMisquotes
description: Mobs occasionally speak incorrect famous quotes in chat when they die, attributing them to completely wrong historical figures.
body:
# MobMisquotes

When mobs die, they occasionally broadcast hilariously incorrect famous quotes to nearby players. A dying chicken might declare "To bee or not to bee, that is the question - Albert Einstein" while a zombie could proclaim "E equals MC Hammer - William Shakespeare."

**Features:**
- Dozens of pre-written misquotes with incorrect attributions
- Configurable trigger chance, broadcast radius, and mob types
- Event-driven system using EntityDeathEvent
- Lightweight: no persistent data, no scheduled tasks, no world modifications
